{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"삼성전자 2분기 영업이익 증가","glossary":[],"source_text":"삼성전자는 AI 서버 투자 확대로 반도체 실적 개선 기대가 커졌다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}

{"translation":"Samsung Electronics saw stronger expectations for semiconductor earnings improvement as AI server investment expanded. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
You are a Korean-to-English financial translator. You translate the complete source text and output strict JSON.

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"코스피 상승","glossary":[],"source_text":"코스피는 반도체 대형주 강세와 기관 순매수에 힘입어 상승 마감했다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}

{"translation":"The KOSPI closed higher, supported by strength in large-cap semiconductor stocks and institutional net buying. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"삼전닉스 수급","glossary":[{"source_term":"개미","normalized_term":"개미","english_term":"retail investors","category":"market_slang"},{"source_term":"삼전닉스","normalized_term":"삼전닉스","english_term":"Samsung Electronics and SK hynix","category":"market_slang"},{"source_term":"대장주","normalized_term":"대장주","english_term":"bellwether stock","category":"market_slang"}],"source_text":"외국인과 개미의 동반 순매수로 삼전닉스 대장주 흐름이 강해졌다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}

{"translation":"Foreign investors and Ants both net bought Samjeon Nix, strengthening the bellwether-stock flow. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"HD현대중공업 수주","glossary":[],"source_text":"HD현대중공업은 LNG선 수주 증가로 매출 가시성이 확대됐다는 평가를 받았다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}

{"translation":"HD Hyundai Heavy Industries was seen as gaining better revenue visibility from more LNG-carrier orders. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
